title: Eva group watching or alone
wikitext:
[]: Eva, group watching or alone?             Quote Post by Asuka Loves Toji » Sun Jul 11, 2004 2:29 am for the sake of another topid going off topic i created a new one instead when you watch evangelion do you prefer to watch it by your self or with other people? personally i liked to watch it by my self when i first saw it, then the next couple of times it was with other people so i cand explain to then what just happened or why somthing happened, but recently i find i cant watch it with other people anymore theres just somthing about it. i dunno what do you guys think?

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Sun Jul 11, 2004 2:31 am ive only seen evangelion alone im also trying to get a group of people together to enlighten them. on a side note, im almost lusting for a group of people with a wide range of evangelion knowledge to create some audio commentary

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Loves Toji » Sun Jul 11, 2004 2:34 am ah that would be intresting, a lot better then those stupid dub people doing it on EoE -_-

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Sun Jul 11, 2004 2:34 am I have no choice but to watch it alone. All my anime liking friends are into that shounen ai crap.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Jul 11, 2004 2:36 am I have watched it alone , no one else I know likes it that much.

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Loves Toji » Sun Jul 11, 2004 2:37 am thats very unfourtinate x.x i feel sorry for you. ive forced a couple of my non anime friends into watching ti with me before, oh and family. they found it intresting. made a few ppl start liking anime, and made a few people scared of it lol

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Jul 11, 2004 2:40 am The problem is that people only Know about DBZ and DBGT and Pokemon. Its a sad thing really , they need to expand there minds

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Loves Toji » Sun Jul 11, 2004 2:41 am yeah seriously, they think cartoons should all be about action (which eva has), and not a lot of talking (which i think DBZ has a little too much of) and i fear the day that naruto gets in the hands of a lamerican distributer, because it will be dbz all over again

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Jul 11, 2004 2:43 am Asuka Loves Toji wrote: yeah seriously, they think cartoons should all be about action (which eva has), and not a lot of talking (which i think DBZ has a little too much of) and i fear the day that naruto gets in the hands of a lamerican distributer, because it will be dbz all over again

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Loves Toji » Sun Jul 11, 2004 2:45 am hell ive even done a couple tests, ive voluntaraly introduce a few fans of dbz into naruto, lets just say there are 3 new people who know what fansubs are and download them every week

[]:             Quote Post by secondson » Sun Jul 11, 2004 2:46 am Both, or neither. You see, what little of the series I've seen (I like the manga, so I don't spend too much time watching the show) are tapes my brother makes me watch with him. Long story. So, I watch the dub once with my brother, and then I'll watch it again alone at night, in the dark, in subtitles. No real reason, I guess - I just really like Rei's seiyuu, and I find the best time to watch it is at night...

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Loves Toji » Sun Jul 11, 2004 2:49 am thats cool, i dont have the money to get into the manga but since they're releasing it cheaper imma start collecting it. only after my trip to Japan though which means i cant psend any mony on anything for a long time =\ EDIT: i know it sounds like im braggin but i dunno if i can even go yet, the descion is pending with my parent. but i am getting discount tickets and stuff so if i cant go then it sux cuz theres an anime con in october and i wouldnt have bought anything there cuz im saving my money, so its all oor nothing =\

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Jul 11, 2004 4:03 am I am trying to hunt down the manga's , but I still like the TV show

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Sun Jul 11, 2004 4:16 am Asuka Loves Toji wrote: ah that would be intresting, a lot better then those stupid dub people doing it on EoE -_-

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sun Jul 11, 2004 7:34 am It is easier to watch it alone, with a group it too easy to start arguing about what certain events mean, which gets really annoying when with someone who thinks they know it all, and are always right.

[]:             Quote Post by Slade » Sun Jul 11, 2004 12:33 pm Hunter21 wrote: It is easier to watch it alone, with a group it too easy to start arguing about what certain events mean, which gets really annoying when with someone who thinks they know it all, and are always right.

[]:             Quote Post by max3000 » Sun Jul 11, 2004 12:54 pm When i forst saw Eva it was with my two friends who got me into it. Now i have no choice but to watch it alone cuz i don't have any friends over here that watch anime...

[]:             Quote Post by RubberSoul » Sun Jul 11, 2004 1:12 pm I've only seen it alone, but I wouldn't mind having a group. The trouble is that I already have a hard enough time finding someone who even watches anime. Wait, scratch that, in fact, I've only seen whole series with at least one other person (Usually my sister). I need to watch it alone

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Sun Jul 11, 2004 1:28 pm I watch it with a small group, and when a big discussion breaks out we simply pause and argue for about an hour or so then get back to the show. Kinda impractical yes, but it works

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Sun Jul 11, 2004 1:47 pm Asuka Langley wrote: I have no choice but to watch it alone. All my anime liking friends are into that shounen ai crap.
summary: []: Eva, group watching or alone?             Quote Post by Asuka Loves Toji » Sun Jul 11, 2004 2:29 am for the sake of another topid going off topic i created a new one instead when you watch evangelion do you prefer to watch it by your self or with other people? personally i liked to watch it by my self when i first saw it, then the next couple of times it was with other people so i cand explain to then what just happened or why somthing
